narrative:
Precinct New Concord (precinct in Muskingum County) has 941 registered voters, with 51.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.1 percentage points.
